subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon the rivers have flowed, and the trees have swayed, and the fruits have spoken with the Tongue of Grandeur [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه جرت الانهار و تمایلت الاشجار و نطقت الاثمار بما نطق لسان العظمه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
